_comment: Consumer-side ARD pin + vendor map — the SINGLE source of truth for which ARD release this plugin adopts and where each upstream kernel artifact is vendored. Mirrors the `adopter_pin` + `vendorable_surface` of upstream ard.json (https://code.s-nc.org/Kevoun/ARD). The plugin's OWN semver (.claude-plugin/.codex-plugin/package.json `version`) is DECOUPLED from this: bump the plugin when the plugin changes; bump `adopts` only on an ARD version sync (driven by epic-agentic-research-ard-sync). Human-facing 'Adopts ARD vX' strings elsewhere are derived from this record.
drift_check: python3 plugins/agentic-research/scripts/ard-sync.py --ard-repo <ARD-checkout>  (or, no checkout: grep -rl 'ARD-Version:' --exclude-dir=tests plugins/agentic-research/scripts plugins/agentic-research/templates plugins/agentic-research/skills)
